creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 167125
svn diff for x11/slock (patch)

The attached patch (svn diff) updates x11/slock to version 1.3.

Changes:
break out the 2 patches from files/patch-pam
update the 2 patches to work with the current version
add man/man1/slock.1.gz to pkg-plist
update distinfo
Makefile:
update PORTVERSION
remove PORTREVISION

that's it!

feel free to add me as MAINTAINER, if need be.

Thanks!

--Chris

currently maintained by ports@ -- implicit approval
